title: Diagnostics, Profiling, Allocation, PGO, Security Gates, and Production Defense · Execution Trace: Capstone Production Defense
summary: A release is slow under load, grows memory, has a suspected goroutine leak, and includes a dependency advisory. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go capstone production defense increment in a measured production release and operations dossier. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Defend a complete Go system through API contracts, failure paths, concurrency ownership, security, diagnostics, deployment, and changed-load evidence.
Gate current toolchain patches, tests, race and fuzz evidence, govulncheck reachability, dependency provenance, reproducible builds, and rollback.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
